---
title: "Title"
author: "Author 1 (First Name Last Name)"
format: 
  docx:
    reference-doc: bfh-template.docx
---

# Test
This is a test.

# LaTeX formula

$$ Y_{it} = \mu_t + \alpha \left(Y_{i,t-1} - \mu_{t-1}\right) + \gamma \, PA^{W}_{i,t-1} + \varepsilon_{it}, \qquad
E(\varepsilon_{it} \mid Y_{i,t-1}) = 0. $$
